name: Cheesy Green Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Green Giant Frozen Cut Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt margarine in a small nonstick saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onion and garlic; cook, stirring frequently, until onion begins to brown. Remove from the saucepan and cover, keeping warm.
3. In the same saucepan, cook beans according to package directions; drain.
4. Add onion mixture; cook until thoroughly heated.
5. Add cheese; toss gently to mix. Serves 2 (1/2 cup) servings.
